headline: ChatGPT and Gemini gain screen annotation capabilities for software navigation
body: OpenAI's ChatGPT and Google's Gemini can now draw directly on your screen to guide users through complex software interfaces. For healthcare systems, this capability has immediate implications for EHR training and clinical workflow optimization, where AI can visually annotate confusing navigation paths in Epic, Cerner, or other platforms. The technology reduces the friction in staff onboarding and can lower support ticket volume by enabling AI to show rather than tell clinicians how to complete documentation tasks. Healthcare IT vendors should anticipate demand for this feature integrated into their training modules and in-application guidance systems as it matures.
